name: cancel_event
description: Cancel a scheduled Calendly event by its UUID. You can optionally provide a reason for the cancellation, which will be included in notifications to invitees. The event's status changes to 'canceled' and the time slot becomes available for new bookings. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: event_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the scheduled event to cancel.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Optional cancellation reason sent to invitees.
parameters.example: Unfortunately I have a scheduling conflict. Let me send you a new link to rebook.

body.reason: Unfortunately I have a scheduling conflict. Let me send you a new link to rebook.

resource.reason: Unfortunately I have a scheduling conflict. Let me send you a new link to rebook.
